c1.descriptionRaw: <color=#FFD780FF>Fantastic Voyage</color>'s ATK increase no longer has an HP restriction, and gains an additional 20% of Bennett's Base ATK.
c1.name: Grand Expectation

c2.descriptionRaw: When Bennett's HP falls below 70%, his Energy Recharge is increased by 30%.
c2.name: Impasse Conqueror

c3.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Passion Overload</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c3.name: Unstoppable Fervor

c4.descriptionRaw:
Using a Normal Attack as the second attack of <color=#FFD780FF>Passion Overload</color>'s Charge Level 1 will perform a follow-up attack.
This additional attack does 135% of the second attack's DMG.
c4.name: Unexpected Odyssey

c5.descriptionRaw:
Increases the Level of <color=#FFD780FF>Fantastic Voyage</color> by 3.
Maximum upgrade level is 15.
c5.name: True Explorer

c6.descriptionRaw: Sword, Claymore, or Polearm-wielding characters inside <color=#FFD780FF>Fantastic Voyage</color>'s radius gain a 15% <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro DMG Bonus</color> and their weapons are infused with <color=#FF9999FF>Pyro</color>.
c6.name: Fire Ventures With Me

profile.description: A good-natured adventurer from Mondstadt who's unfortunately extremely unlucky.
profile.name: Bennett
profile.title: Trial by Fire

combat1.descriptionRaw:
<color=#FFD780FF>Normal Attack</color>
Performs up to 5 rapid strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Charged Attack</color>
Consumes a certain amount of Stamina to unleash 2 rapid sword strikes.

<color=#FFD780FF>Plunging Attack</color>
Plunges from mid-air to strike the ground below, damaging opponents along the path and dealing AoE DMG upon impact.
combat1.name: Strike of Fortune

combat2.descriptionRaw: #Bennett puts all his fire and passion for adventuring into his sword. Results may vary based on how fired up he is... {LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} A single, swift flame strike that deals Pyro DMG. Hold (Short) Charges up, resulting in different effects when unleashed based on the Charge Level. ·Level 1: Strikes twice, dealing Pyro DMG and launching opponents. ·Level 2: Unleashes 3 consecutive attacks that deal impressive Pyro DMG, but the last attack triggers an explosion that launches both Bennett and the enemy. Bennett takes no damage from being launched. An attack that combines Bennett's dreams and passion with Pyro. But passion is sometimes overblown, and Pyro sometimes blows over.
combat2.name: Passion Overload

labels: Continuous Regeneration Per Sec|{param2:F2P} Max HP+{param3:I}

combat3.descriptionRaw: Bennett performs a jumping attack that deals Pyro DMG, creating an Inspiration Field. Inspiration Field ·If the health of a character within the AoE is equal to or falls below 70%, their health will continuously regenerate. The amount of HP restored scales off Bennett's Max HP. ·If the health of a character within the AoE is higher than 70%, they gain an ATK Bonus that is based on Bennett's Base ATK. ·Imbues characters within the AoE with Pyro. Benny's Adventure Team's adventures are always fraught with unexpected danger. However, Bennett is more inclined to call them "journeys full of wonder, excitement, and beauty."
combat3.name: Fantastic Voyage

passive2.descriptionRaw:
Within the area created by <color=#FFD780FF>Fantastic Voyage</color>, <color=#FFD780FF>Passion Overload</color> takes on the following effects:
·CD is reduced by 50%.
·Bennett will not be launched by the effects of Charge Level 2.
passive2.name: Fearnaught

passive3.descriptionRaw: When dispatched on an expedition in Mondstadt, time consumed is reduced by 25%.
passive3.name: It Should Be Safe...
